title: Link text columns to updates
excerpt: I need our team to enter short sentence each week about their work in a column for export purposes. I would like to capture that sentence also in the update functionality. Add an automation that every time a new sentence…

posts.author: asaf.verint (asaf)
posts.cookedHtml: I need our team to enter short sentence each week about their work in a column for export purposes. I would like to capture that sentence also in the update functionality. Add an automation that every time a new sentence is added, it will be copied to the updates.
